settings.editor:
EMI Instructor (PM/Leadership)

Mission:

The mission of the EMI Instructor (PM/Leadership) is to act as a subject matter expert focused on helping AEC organizations develop more effective people leaders and project managers. The PM/Leadership Instructor will do this by delivering custom learning and development programs, and consulting on the design of these programs as needed. This position is offered as a full-time or part-time position.

Outcomes:

1. Service clients by serving as a subject matter expert through program design including:

a. Interview program participants, leadership team members, project leaders and project managers prior to the program design.

b. Review and provide input on the program curriculum during development.

c. Lead or participate in design meetings with the client. 

2. Serve as one of the instructors for EMI's custom leadership and project management development programs including:

a. Lead 2 to 4 virtual sessions per week focused on participant engagement.

b. Help to guide and grow other EMI instructors through training and mentoring

c. Strive to engage participants so that EMI may achieve its goal of 100% assignment completion.

Qualifications

  • A bachelor's degree from an accredited college or university in engineering, architecture, land surveying or related field, OR significant speaking experience regardless of educational background.
  • Minimum of seven (7) years of relevant experience in your technical field as a project manager.
  • Engineering or equivalent license highly recommended, but not required.
  • Speaking/instruction skills: previous experience speaking in public or presenting is a MUST.

Benefits

  • Depends on full-time or part-time. Details to be provided.

Expected Salary

  • Depends on full-time or part-time. Details to be provided.

Work Location

  • Remote.

What Makes the Engineering Management Institute a Great Place to Work…

The Engineering Management Institute is the gold standard learning and development resource for engineers and technical professionals worldwide. EMI empowers technical professionals to become the leaders they need to be to solve the world's biggest problems by providing highly relevant content and training that transfers back to their jobs.

EMI is a great place to work as we work with top engineering organizations globally, we are growing fast, and focus greatly on helping our team members achieve their personal and professional goals. We do this by following our guiding principles (give, guide, and grow).  We ask all EMI team members to give their all, guide each other, and grow together.  We also employ a quarterly profit sharing program, so that as EMI grows, all team members are rewarded monetarily for their contributions to EMI's growth.

If you are interested in joining a dynamic team, and working on exciting growth-oriented projects, please consider this role. Joining the EMI team may be an avenue to fast-track the achievement of your professional and personal goals.

Apply Today by Completing this Form
